activities_projects.title: Sustainable Farming Model
steps: Research sustainable farming practices
Create a flow diagram showing crop production and livestock integration
Explain benefits for environment and farmers

activities_projects.title: Hybridisation Case Study
steps: Study hybridisation in crop plants
Write a case study on improved crop varieties
Explain benefits such as disease resistance

activities_projects.title: Soil Fertility Investigation
steps: Collect soil samples from different locations
Observe color, texture and moisture
Discuss how soil fertility affects crop yield

activities_projects.title: Integrated Farming Plan
steps: Plan a farm including crops, livestock and fish farming
Draw the layout
Explain how each component supports the other

activities_projects.title: Pest Control Strategy Report
steps: Research chemical and biological pest control methods
Compare their advantages
Write a report recommending best practices

activities_projects.title: Animal Feed Analysis
steps: List components of animal feed
Explain roughage and concentrates
Describe how balanced diet improves productivity
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Analyzes importance of balanced animal nutrition

activities_projects.title: Poultry Farm Management Plan
steps: Design a poultry farm layout
Include feeding, housing and disease control
Explain management practices

activities_projects.title: Aquaculture Research Project
steps: Research aquaculture systems
Explain benefits compared to capture fishing
Prepare a short project report

activities_projects.title: Honey Production Process Diagram
steps: Draw stages of honey production
Label nectar collection, hive storage and extraction
Explain each stage

activities_projects.title: Future of Food Production Essay
steps: Research challenges such as population growth and resource limitations
Write an essay discussing solutions
Include sustainable agriculture methods
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of argument and clarity (10 marks)
